mapper.select: SELECT id, table_id, package_id, initial_guest_cnt, check_in_time, check_out_time, is_active, total_amount FROM board_cafe_kiosk_2603.table_session WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_active = true
mapper.update: UPDATE board_cafe_kiosk_2603.table_session SET is_active = FALSE, check_out_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND is_active = TRUE
